STG_3_PRSR_ULCR_DSCHRG_POA_NUM STG_3_PRSR_ULCR_DSCHRG_POA_NUM M0300C2 Stage 3 Pressure Ulcers Discharge Present on Admission Number CHAR 1 The number of Stage 3 pressure ulcers at discharge that were present on admission
204 STG_3_ULCR_DSCHRG_UNSTGBL_NUM STG_3_ULCR_DSCHRG_UNSTGBL_NUM M0300C3 Stage 3 Pressure Ulcers Discharge Unstageable on Admission Number CHAR 1 The number of Stage 3 pressure ulcers at discharge that were unstageable on admission.
